title: rothia andryaloides
intro: Rothia andryaloides is a plant species belonging to the Celastraceae family, native to various regions, including the Himalayas and China. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain compounds with antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. It is traditionally used for its health benefits, including treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Rothia andryaloides is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, the roots are dried and used in traditional medicine formulations.
